en: TO THE CHOIRMASTER. OF THE SONS OF KORAH. ACCORDING TO ALAMOTH. A SONG. God is our refuge and strength, a very present help in trouble.
zh: 神是我們的避難所，是我們的力量， 是我們在患難中隨時都可得到的幫助。

en: Therefore we will not fear though the earth gives way, though the mountains be moved into the heart of the sea,
zh: 因此，地雖然震動， 群山雖然崩塌入海洋的深處， 我們也不害怕。

en: though its waters roar and foam, though the mountains tremble at its swelling. Selah
zh: 雖然海浪翻騰澎湃， 雖然山嶽因波濤洶湧搖動， 我們也不害怕。

en: There is a river whose streams make glad the city of God, the holy habitation of the Most High.
zh: 有一條河，它眾多的支流使 神的城充滿快樂； 這城就是至高者居住的聖所。

en: God is in the midst of her; she shall not be moved; God will help her when morning dawns.
zh: 神在城中，城必不動搖； 天一亮， 神必幫助它。

en: The nations rage, the kingdoms totter; he utters his voice, the earth melts.
zh: 列邦喧嚷，萬國動搖； 神一發聲，地就融化。

en: The LORD of hosts is with us; the God of Jacob is our fortress. Selah
zh: 萬軍之耶和華與我們同在； 雅各的 神是我們的保障。

en: Come, behold the works of the LORD, how he has brought desolations on the earth.
zh: 你們都來，看耶和華的作為， 看他怎樣使地荒涼。

en: He makes wars cease to the end of the earth; he breaks the bow and shatters the spear; he burns the chariots with fire.
zh: 他使戰爭止息，直到地極； 他把弓折毀，把矛砍斷， 把戰車用火焚燒。

en: "Be still, and know that I am God. I will be exalted among the nations, I will be exalted in the earth!"
zh: 你們要住手，要知道我是 神； 我要在列國中被尊崇，我要在全地上被尊崇。

en: The LORD of hosts is with us; the God of Jacob is our fortress. Selah
zh: 萬軍之耶和華與我們同在； 雅各的 神是我們的保障。 可拉子孫的詩，交給詩班長。
